title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Municipal Mayor Caesar P. Perez to Enter and Sign Into an Agreement/deed of Sale in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños for the Acquisition of a Parcel of Land Covering an Area of Nine Thousand Seven Hundred Five Square Meters (9,705 SQ.M.) Located at Barangay Timugan, Los Baños, Laguna As Relocation Site. ( AUTHOR : HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 09/28/2020)
